data.name: 色色陷阱地牢ROGUELIKE
data.detailed_description:
色色陷阱地牢
在色色陷阱地牢中拯救夥伴並擴大公會的ROGUELIKE RPG！

深度遊戲色色陷阱地牢！

■故事

冒險者的敵人——魅魔發現了色色陷阱地牢。

“對了，如果把冒險者扔到這裡，就能高效地獵殺他們了。”

魅魔運營著一個假冒的公會，將冒險者們送進色色陷阱地牢。

將大量冒險者送進色色陷阱地牢，掠奪寶物，壯大公會。

■系統

★拯救夥伴增加公會成員

在色色陷阱地牢中拯救瀕死的夥伴，可以增加公會成員。公會成員增加，經驗值就會不斷增長。

★用從冒險者那裡掠奪的GOLD和素材提升能力

用掠奪來的GOLD和素材升級各種能力！探索變得越來越容易。

★個性十足的探索成員

不同的成員升級所需的經驗值不同。有些成員還能將交易金額減半。

★全員出擊！挑戰地圖

在挑戰地圖上，六個冒險者成員全員出擊！切換成員，解決機關，推進探索！

★當然還有色色的陷阱！

大量色色的陷阱和色色的怪物！不斷將冒險者送進色色陷阱地牢！

■特點

沒有遊戲結束！
通過反覆探索來攻略色色陷阱地牢，壯大公會的ROGUELIKE遊戲！

・簡單卻深奧的反覆探索ROGUELIKE！
・通過反覆探索不斷提升能力！
・獲得色色陷阱地牢深處的寶物！
・充滿個性的地圖！
・角色換裝！
・豐富的色色陷阱、色色怪物！
・還有令人震驚的結局在等待著你！

data.short_description: 色色陷阱地牢 在色色陷阱地牢中拯救夥伴並擴大公會的ROGUELIKE RPG！ 深度遊戲色色陷阱地牢！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.name: ERO TRAP DUNGEON ROGUELIKE
data.detailed_description:
Ero Trap Dungeon
A roguelike RPG where you rescue comrades and expand your guild!

Immersive Ero Trap Dungeon!

■Story

A succubus who hunts adventurers finds the Ero Trap Dungeon.

"This is perfect, I can efficiently hunt adventurers by trapping them here."

The succubus runs a fake guild, luring adventurers into the Ero Trap Dungeon.

Send numerous adventurers into the Ero Trap Dungeon, plunder treasures, and grow your guild.

■System

★ Rescue comrades to increase guild members

Rescue comrades on the brink of death in the Ero Trap Dungeon to add to your guild members. The more members you have, the more experience points you gain.

★ Upgrade abilities with GOLD and materials looted from adventurers

Use the GOLD and materials looted from adventurers to level up various abilities! This makes exploration easier.

★ Unique exploration members

Each member requires different amounts of experience points to level up. Some members can even reduce transaction costs by half.

★ Full squad deployment on challenge maps

On challenge maps, deploy all six adventurer members! Switch between members to solve traps and advance the exploration.

★ Naturally, erotic and alluring traps!

Packed with numerous erotic traps and erotic monsters! Keep sending adventurers into the Ero Trap Dungeon!


■ Features

No game over!
A roguelike game where you repeatedly explore and conquer the Ero Trap Dungeon to grow your guild!

・Simple yet deeply engaging roguelike!
・Increase abilities with repeated explorations!
・Obtain treasures buried deep in the Ero Trap Dungeon!
・Numerous unique maps!
・Character customization available!
・Abundant erotic traps and erotic monsters!
・And a shocking ending awaits!

Minimum:

  • Processor: Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • Processor: Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
